name: relayapi
description: Post to 21 platforms via a single unified API. Manage accounts, upload media, schedule posts, and track analytics through RelayAPI.

interface.longDescription: Post to 21 platforms via a single API. Manage accounts, upload media, schedule posts, set up webhooks, and track analytics.
defaultPrompt: Use RelayAPI to post to Twitter and LinkedIn.
Use RelayAPI to list my connected social media accounts.
Use RelayAPI to schedule a post for tomorrow.
